metadata.description: Public marketplace of Claude Code and Codex plugins by aantonovg.

plugins.name: sensortower
plugins.description: Sensor Tower MCP server (FastMCP) — 85 tools for app intelligence: rankings, top apps, app metadata, downloads, revenue, demographics, keywords.

plugins.name: libreoffice
plugins.description: Live LibreOffice Writer editing from Claude Code and Codex: 88 MCP tools talking to a LibreOffice extension over HTTP localhost:8765. v1.0.9 fixes Codex MCP discovery by using the canonical top-level mcpServers shape and a more robust plugin-root fallback when ${PLUGIN_ROOT}/${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} are not substituted. v1.0.8 adds Codex plugin metadata and a dual-client MCP launcher compatible with Codex ${PLUGIN_ROOT} and Claude Code ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}. v1.0.7 enriches get_page_layout with table_groups[] — adjacent ODT tables with matching column count are recognized as one logical 'split table' (ODT models a broken-across-pages table as two TextTable objects between which the layout engine redistributes rows when content shifts). v1.0.6: get_page_layout — every paragraph/table/row/frame mapped to its actual page via ViewCursor.getPage() with start_page/end_page/spans_pages markers (the only way to see real page breaks since UNO does not expose them statically). v1.0.5: read_paragraph_xml as escape hatch for fo:* attributes UNO hides. v1.0.4: list_body_elements/read_table_rich/write_table_cell_rich (preserves runs+column widths), set_paragraph_breaks (BreakType+PageDescName), set_paragraph_text_flow (widows/orphans/keep_with_next), char_height per paragraph, set_footer_page_number, frame anchor index. v1.0.3: full symmetric get/set for paragraph and page styles, clone_paragraph_style/clone_page_style/clone_numbering_rule for bulk replication, graceful shutdown_application. Includes libreoffice-word skill that auto-activates on .odt/.doc/.docx/.rtf.
